title: frozen
description: Exploring personal growth and overcoming adversity.
lyrics: Ooh, baby, I think that you need a contemplative restart in your mind Like a redesign, there's no crime in wanting better than you see Ooh, baby, I know you, it's you All I know is you're just frozen Frozen inside, girl, just blazing Always the fire from the night, you're just frozen Ooh, every time you talk about the things that make you lose Inside, girl, you're frozen In the spectacular view of your defeat But there's still hope in here, and I promise you I know the night gets darker then it gets light quicker And the coldest of the coldest when it comes to your damn right Just before the whole entire room, there's a sun wave Someway we'll make it through this and not be frozen And someday I won't be frozen In the night, in the light, in the everything that makes me right I can't find my words When you do it all night, it infections my energy In the swarm of all, you're frozen I know, can't let the right one in, you're blazing With all that fire in you, baby, you're frozen We'll get melt, ice down around you I hope so too, you'll see I know, you think it's all on shot But maybe there's more than what you think you got Seems the money's on the table, baby, I'm betting us Seems the money's on the table, baby, don't bet on us, you're frozen I know, you're freezing With all the fire that's loving you season I wish you could get high again Maybe bring our life up to a light so we can Fresken our beginnings and I'm frozen Now that you haven't talked to me Why won't you?

lyricsSegments.text: Ooh, baby, I think that you need a contemplative restart in your mind
Like a redesign, there's no crime in wanting better than you see
Ooh, baby, I know you, it's you
All I know is you're just frozen
Frozen inside, girl, just blazing
Always the fire from the night, you're just frozen
Ooh, every time you talk about the things that make you lose
Inside, girl, you're frozen
In the spectacular view of your defeat
But there's still hope in here, and I promise you
I know the night gets darker then it gets light quicker
And the coldest of the coldest when it comes to your damn right
Just before the whole entire room, there's a sun wave
Someway we'll make it through this and not be frozen
And someday I won't be frozen
In the night, in the light, in the everything that makes me right
I can't find my words
When you do it all night, it infections my energy
In the swarm of all, you're frozen
I know, can't let the right one in, you're blazing
With all that fire in you, baby, you're frozen
We'll get melt, ice down around you
I hope so too, you'll see
I know, you think it's all on shot
But maybe there's more than what you think you got
Seems the money's on the table, baby, I'm betting us
Seems the money's on the table, baby, don't bet on us, you're frozen
I know, you're freezing
With all the fire that's loving you season
I wish you could get high again
Maybe bring our life up to a light so we can
Fresken our beginnings and I'm frozen
Now that you haven't talked to me
Why won't you?
